summary: Analytics De-mocking Feature fully tested. All 28 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Demographics, geographic distribution, and best-time-to-post analytics are now connected to real MongoDB data (3,864 analytics_events) instead of hardcoded values.
critical_code_review_comments: Demographics endpoint correctly returns data_source='analytics_events' and data_points count
Geo endpoint correctly returns data_source='analytics_events' with real country/city distributions
Best-times endpoint correctly returns data_source='real' with computed heatmap from engagement patterns
Frontend Demographics tab shows 'Computed from 3,864 engagement events across 9 platforms' indicator
Frontend Best Time to Post tab shows 'Computed from real engagement patterns' indicator
Data points badge (3,864) correctly appears in header when data exists
Seed button correctly hidden when data already exists (data_points > 0)
Age distribution percentages sum to ~100% (verified in tests)
Country percentages sum to ~100% (verified in tests)
Heatmap correctly returns 7x24 matrix with normalized values 0-1
All demographic sections (age, gender, devices, interests, geo) render with real computed data
seed_data_creation: Analytics data already seeded (3,864 events in analytics_events collection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics de-mocking feature fully tested. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Auth returns 'access_token'. Demographics/geo/best-times endpoints now return real computed data from analytics_events collection with data_source and data_points fields. Frontend shows data source indicators and 3,864 data points badge. All tabs (Overview, Anomaly Detection, Demographics, Best Time to Post, Content, Revenue) working correctly.

backend_apis.POST /api/analytics/seed-data: PASS - Returns message about seeding status
backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/demographics: PASS - Returns data_source='analytics_events', data_points=3864, age_groups, gender_split, devices, interests
backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/geo: PASS - Returns data_source='analytics_events', data_points=3862, countries, top_cities_us, primary_market
backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/best-times: PASS - Returns data_source='real', heatmap 7x24, recommendations, top_slots
backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/overview: PASS - Returns real content stats from MongoDB
backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/content-performance: PASS - Returns real content performance data

frontend_ui.6 tabs visible: PASS - Overview, Anomaly Detection, Demographics, Best Time to Post, Content, Revenue
frontend_ui.Demographics tab - data source indicator: PASS - Shows 'Computed from 3,864 engagement events across 9 platforms'
frontend_ui.Demographics tab - devices: PASS - Shows Mobile 67.9%, Desktop 22.2%, Tablet 7%, Smart TV 2.9%
frontend_ui.Demographics tab - interests: PASS - Shows Hip-Hop/Rap 34%, Cultural Commentary 17.2%, etc.
frontend_ui.Demographics tab - geo distribution: PASS - Shows 14 countries, US 53.3%, top US cities
frontend_ui.Best Time to Post tab - data source indi: PASS - Shows 'Computed from real engagement patterns'
frontend_ui.Best Time to Post tab - recommendations: PASS - Shows Saturday Peak, Sunday High, Wednesday High, Tuesday High
frontend_ui.Best Time to Post tab - heatmap: PASS - Shows 7x24 engagement heatmap with color coding

mocked_data_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All analytics now computed from real MongoDB data (analytics_events collection)
